title: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer - .Net, AWS

description:
About the job
We're partnering with a well established Finance company, who offer quality, market leading and award winning products across the insurance sector.

They're currently growing their Product Engineering team, with interesting modernisation projects, upgrading their systems from Monolithic to Microservices architecture. You will be working on a cross functional team, working on interesting projects with exceptional engineering best practice and modern technology.

They are innovative, listening to direct feedback from their large customer base, enabling you to make a real impact on the product. You will be working on their main product, onboarding new customers on their digital platform. 

This is a Full Stack Engineer role, working on the front end around 20-30% of time. AWS experience is essential. 

Requirements;
.Net/.Net Core
AWS experience and leveraging AWS services
CI/CD
Experience with distributed systems
React, Angular

Their culture is second to none, they have great staff tenure and offer great career growth opportunities. They are flexible and offer hybrid working arrangements.

questions.q: How many years of work experience do you have with Amazon Web Services (AWS)?
